docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,253.00 FILED BY SKYLINE REALTY, INC. LEMBI FRANK E. AS TO DEFENDANT ASHFORD RUDOLPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
